metadata.summary: Conversation, flexible Scratch memory and accepted work outcomes.

recipes.summary: Create, join, park or close explicit working memory.
Discuss one bounded frame without side effects.
Build a focused live map of a Target.
Open several candidate directions without deciding for the user.
Recommend or compare directions with explicit tradeoffs.
Render a chat-first recap with useful diagrams.
Draft an actionable plan, shape or wiring view.

onboarding.question: Which decisions or handoffs should become durable Scratch notes?
onboarding.explanation: Hairness records semantic boundaries, never a transcript.
